configurations.name: mimo
runtimeArgs: import os,functools,socketserver,http.server; H=functools.partial(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, directory='/private/tmp/mimo-serve'); socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address=True; s=socketserver.TCPServer(('127.0.0.1', int(os.environ.get('PORT','5199'))), H); s.serve_forever()
